summary: Replaced the original systems_architect writer after three wait windows and shutdown without a REVIEW/PARTIAL/BLOCKED handoff. The replacement systems_architect must inherit the existing partial diff on codex/m7-map-topology-schema and complete the authoritative topology schema task without reverting prior work.

tests_run.result: Observed partial uncommitted topology schema implementation diff on the task branch before replacement.
Previous status was running; no handoff was returned.

decisions.decision: Close the stalled writer and replace it instead of leaving M7 topology recovery blocked indefinitely.
The replacement writer must continue from the existing partial implementation and must not revert another agent's work unless a later review identifies a concrete defect.

risks.summary: The previous writer produced uncommitted topology schema code without a structured handoff.
risks.mitigation: Replacement systems_architect must document inherited work in the final REVIEW handoff and run the required tests before QA routing.

requested_action: Complete M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 from the inherited partial diff and return the expected REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer.
